steps.content: Roblox Studio is where you create games. It has many panels and tools to help you build amazing experiences.

steps.instruction: Create a simple script that prints a welcome message:
steps.starterCode:
-- Create a welcome message for your game
-- Print it to the output
steps.hint: Use print() to display messages in the output

steps.content: Great! In Roblox Studio, scripts run in the game and can interact with the game world.
